hooks.command: echo "$(date): Stop hook executed" >> /Users/takahashimika/Dropbox/web_kabu_ai/hook_log.txt && osascript -e 'display notification "タスクが完了しました" with title "Claude Code" subtitle "作業完了" sound name "Glass"'
